mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pbi.id) FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' and 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pbi.id) FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' and pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pbi.id) FROM prospective_basic_info pbi WHERE pbi.survey_or_exam='survey' and type = '对照组'

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = '男' AND is_vip = 'vip' THEN 1 END) AS male_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = '女' AND is_vip = 'vip' THEN 1 END) AS female_count, AVG(actual_age) AS average_age, MIN(actual_age) AS min_age, MAX(actual_age) AS max_age, AVG(mission_point_altitude) AS average_mission_point_altitude, MIN(mission_point_altitude) AS min_mission_point_altitude, MAX(mission_point_altitude) AS max_mission_point_altitude, AVG(plateau_training_duration) AS average_plateau_mission_duration, MIN(plateau_training_duration) AS min_plateau_mission_duration, MAX(plateau_training_duration) AS max_plateau_mission_duration FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pbi.gender, pbi.actual_age, pbi.is_vip,pessti.plateau_training_duration, pessti.mission_point_altitude FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration ) t

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = '男' AND is_vip = 'vip' THEN 1 END) AS male_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = '女' AND is_vip = 'vip' THEN 1 END) AS female_count, AVG(actual_age) AS average_age, MIN(actual_age) AS min_age, MAX(actual_age) AS max_age, AVG(mission_point_altitude) AS average_mission_point_altitude, MIN(mission_point_altitude) AS min_mission_point_altitude, MAX(mission_point_altitude) AS max_mission_point_altitude, AVG(plateau_training_duration) AS average_plateau_mission_duration, MIN(plateau_training_duration) AS min_plateau_mission_duration, MAX(plateau_training_duration) AS max_plateau_mission_duration FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pbi.gender, pbi.actual_age, pbi.is_vip,pessti.plateau_training_duration, pessti.mission_point_altitude FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 ) t

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = '男' THEN 1 END) AS male_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = '女' THEN 1 END) AS female_count, AVG(actual_age) AS average_age, MIN(actual_age) AS min_age, MAX(actual_age) AS max_age, AVG(mission_point_altitude) AS average_mission_point_altitude, MIN(mission_point_altitude) AS min_mission_point_altitude, MAX(mission_point_altitude) AS max_mission_point_altitude, AVG(plateau_training_duration) AS average_plateau_mission_duration, MIN(plateau_training_duration) AS min_plateau_mission_duration, MAX(plateau_training_duration) AS max_plateau_mission_duration FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pbi.gender, pbi.actual_age, pbi.is_vip,pessti.plateau_training_duration, pessti.mission_point_altitude FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.survey_or_exam='survey' AND type = '对照组' ) t

SELECT CASE WHEN ethnicity IS NULL OR ethnicity = '' THEN '其他' ELSE ethnicity END AS ethnicity, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pboi.ethnicity FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_basic_other_info pboi ON pboi.person_id = pbi.id LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration ) t GROUP BY CASE WHEN ethnicity IS NULL OR ethnicity = '' THEN '其他' ELSE ethnicity END ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT CASE WHEN ethnicity IS NULL OR ethnicity = '' THEN '其他' ELSE ethnicity END AS ethnicity, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pboi.ethnicity FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_basic_other_info pboi ON pboi.person_id = pbi.id LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 ) t GROUP BY CASE WHEN ethnicity IS NULL OR ethnicity = '' THEN '其他' ELSE ethnicity END ORDER BY count DESC;

select COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score < 6 AND time_point = 2 THEN 1 END) AS score_lt_6, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score >= 6 AND total_score <= 15 AND time_point = 2 THEN 1 END) AS score_6_to_15, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score > 15 AND total_score <= 25 AND time_point = 2 THEN 1 END) AS score_16_to_25, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score > 25 AND time_point = 2 THEN 1 END) AS score_gt_25, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score >= 6 AND time_point = 2 THEN 1 END) AS score_gte_6, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score < 6 AND time_point = 3 THEN 1 END) AS score_lt_6_tp3, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score >= 6 AND total_score <= 15 AND time_point = 3 THEN 1 END) AS score_6_to_15_tp3, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score > 15 AND total_score <= 25 AND time_point = 3 THEN 1 END) AS score_16_to_25_tp3, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score > 25 AND time_point = 3 THEN 1 END) AS score_gt_25_tp3, COUNT(CASE WHEN total_score >= 6 AND time_point = 3 THEN 1 END) AS score_gte_6_tp3, -- 在 time_point=2 得分>=6，time_point=3 得分小于6 的人数 阳性转阴性 ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t2 JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t3 ON t2.person_id = t3.person_id WHERE t2.time_point = 2 AND t2.total_score >= 6 AND t3.time_point = 3 AND t3.total_score < 6 AND t2.person_id IN ( SELECT pbi.id FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) ) AS score_downgrade_count1, -- 在 time_point=2 得分>=6，time_point=3 得分>=6 的人数 持续阳性 ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t2 JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t3 ON t2.person_id = t3.person_id WHERE t2.time_point = 2 AND t2.total_score >= 6 AND t3.time_point = 3 AND t3.total_score >= 6 AND t2.person_id IN ( SELECT pbi.id FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) ) AS score_downgrade_count2, -- 在 time_point=2 得分小于6，time_point=3 得分>=6 的人数 阴性转阳性 ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t2 JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t3 ON t2.person_id = t3.person_id WHERE t2.time_point = 2 AND t2.total_score < 6 AND t3.time_point = 3 AND t3.total_score >= 6 AND t2.person_id IN ( SELECT pbi.id FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) ) AS score_downgrade_count3, -- 在 time_point=2 得分小于6，time_point=3 得分小于6 的人数 持续阴性 ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t2 JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t3 ON t2.person_id = t3.person_id WHERE t2.time_point = 2 AND t2.total_score < 6 AND t3.time_point = 3 AND t3.total_score < 6 AND t2.person_id IN ( SELECT pbi.id FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) ) AS score_downgrade_count4, -- 在 time_point=2 得分>25，time_point=3 得分>25 的人数 持续重度 ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t2 JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t3 ON t2.person_id = t3.person_id WHERE t2.time_point = 2 AND t2.total_score > 25 AND t3.time_point = 3 AND t3.total_score > 25 AND t2.person_id IN ( SELECT pbi.id FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) ) AS score_downgrade_count5, -- 在 time_point=2 得分小于等于25，time_point=3 得分>25 的人数 转为重度 ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t2 JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary t3 ON t2.person_id = t3.person_id WHERE t2.time_point = 2 AND t2.total_score <= 25 AND t3.time_point = 3 AND t3.total_score > 25 AND t2.person_id IN ( SELECT pbi.id FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) ) AS score_downgrade_count6 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pesss.total_score, pesss.time_point FROM prospective_basic_info pbi LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_score_summary pesss ON pesss.person_id = pbi.id LEFT JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip'
AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration
AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12
AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude
AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000
) t

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN time_point = 1 AND plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude THEN 1 END) AS dur12_a3000_to_4000, COUNT(CASE WHEN time_point = 1 AND plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude THEN 1 END) AS dur12_a4000_to_5000, COUNT(CASE WHEN time_point = 1 AND plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000 THEN 1 END) AS dur12_a5000,
COUNT(CASE WHEN time_point = 1 AND 12 > plateau_training_duration AND mission_point_altitude >= 3000 AND 4000 > mission_point_altitude THEN 1 END) AS durlt12_a3000_to_4000, COUNT(CASE WHEN time_point = 1 AND 12 > plateau_training_duration AND mission_point_altitude >= 4000 AND 5000 > mission_point_altitude THEN 1 END) AS durlt12_a4000_to_5000, COUNT(CASE WHEN time_point = 1 AND 12 > plateau_training_duration AND mission_point_altitude >= 5000 THEN 1 END) AS durlt12_a5000 FROM (SELECT DISTINCT pbi.id, pessti.time_point, pessti.plateau_training_duration, pessti.mission_point_altitude FROM prospective_basic_info pbi JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip' ) t

SELECT
SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.fatigue ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.weakness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.drowsiness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.dizziness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.vertigo ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.poor_concentration ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.slow_reaction ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.memory_loss ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.insomnia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.nightmares ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.sore_throat ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.cough ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.phlegm ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.wheezing ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.chest_tightness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.chest_pain ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.palpitations ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.bradycardia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.cyanosis ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.blood_pressure_fluctuation ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.skin_bleeding ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.skin_bruising ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.anemia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.weight_loss ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.increased_appetite ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.anorexia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.constipation ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.diarrhea ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.abdominal_pain ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.abdominal_distension ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.jaundice ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.numbness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.limb_edema ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.facial_edema ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.hair_loss ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.increased_urination ELSE 0 END) AS total_score_q1,
SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND pessti.plateau_training_duration >= 12 AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.${req.pesprs} ELSE 0 END) AS total_score_q1,
SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.fatigue ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.weakness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.drowsiness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.dizziness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.vertigo ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.poor_concentration ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.slow_reaction ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.memory_loss ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.insomnia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.nightmares ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.sore_throat ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.cough ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.phlegm ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.wheezing ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.chest_tightness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.chest_pain ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.palpitations ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.bradycardia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.cyanosis ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.blood_pressure_fluctuation ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.skin_bleeding ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.skin_bruising ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.anemia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.weight_loss ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.increased_appetite ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.anorexia ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.constipation ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.diarrhea ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.abdominal_pain ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.abdominal_distension ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.jaundice ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.numbness ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.limb_edema ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.facial_edema ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.hair_loss ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.increased_urination ELSE 0 END) AS total_score_q2
SUM(CASE WHEN pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint} AND 12 > pessti.plateau_training_duration AND pbi.is_vip = 'vip' THEN pesprs.${req.pesprs} ELSE 0 END) AS total_score_q2
FROM prospective_experiment_survey_post_return_symptoms pesprs JOIN prospective_basic_info pbi ON pesprs.person_id = pbi.id JOIN prospective_experiment_survey_station_training_info pessti ON pessti.person_id = pbi.id AND pessti.time_point = pesprs.time_point WHERE pbi.is_vip = 'vip'
AND pesprs.time_point = #{req.timePoint}
